description:
Files: src/aot_codegen.rs, runtime/src/heap.rs

11a — Alloc RTL: AOT does not inline bump allocation.
  pub extern "C" fn fz_alloc(size: u64) -> u64 {
      current_process().heap.alloc(size as usize) as u64
  }
fz_alloc calls Heap::alloc which sets FZ_SHOULD_YIELD at the watermark. AOT call sites call fz_alloc instead of inlining the bump.

11b — Inline back-edge check: same 3-instruction pattern (load global, branch) at every is_back_edge site in AOT-generated native code. Slow path calls fz_yield_back_edge. Resume shims emitted as ordinary extern C functions in the AOT binary.

Tests: fz-sched.12 integration cases via AOT mode.
title: fz-sched.11: AOT parity — alloc RTL and inline back-edge check in native code
